name: FileResolvingEventArgs
summary: Event arguments used for the Application::FileResolving event

properties.name: FileNameToOpen
properties.summary: Set file name to open to read contents of resolved file. Leave as null if ResolveToOpen is false or file can’t be resolved.

properties.name: Handled
properties.summary: Set whether event handler has handled file resolution. If set to true, default file resolution will not occur.

properties.name: ResolvedFileReference
properties.summary: Set file reference that FileReference has been resolved to. Leave as null if file can’t be resolved.
